narrative:
Brecksville-00-I (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,137 registered voters, with 52.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.3%, a modest Republican lean of 4.7 percentage points.
